name: recent_patients
description: Per-staff list of recently interacted patients. Closes the lost-context gap after inbox-style workflows like signing a result, replying to a message, or completing a task.

applications.name: Recent Patients
applications.description: Open the modal showing the patients you've most recently touched.

applications.name: Recent Patients
applications.description: Open the modal from inside a patient chart.

protocols.description: Capture a chart open as a patient touch.
Capture a profile open as a patient touch.
Capture chart-review note sign-offs (the inbox result-review path for labs / imaging / consults / uncategorized documents) as a chart touch.
Nightly prune of interactions older than 7 days.

handlers.description: Serves the Recent Patients UI and JSON endpoints.
